settings.heading: Long Service Awards — 5, 10, 15 & 20 Years
settings.subheading: Recognise employee loyalty with milestone long-service awards — crystal and wood pieces engraved with years of service, name and your logo. Co-ordinated sets, GST-invoiced. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Long service awards mark 5, 10, 15 and 20-year milestones with engraved crystal or wooden pieces showing the years, name and your logo — from around ₹500. Meru Trophy supplies co-ordinated, GST-invoiced sets. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: Long-service awards reward loyalty and signal that your company values it. Each milestone (5/10/15/20 years) gets a tasteful crystal or wooden award engraved with the years, recipient name and your logo, often tiered so longer service feels more significant. We co-ordinate the whole programme with one GST invoice. Pair with our recognition program.

settings.title: Years & name engraved
settings.text: "10 Years of Service" plus recipient name.

settings.question: How should long-service awards be tiered?
settings.answer: Distinct designs for 5/10/15/20 years, often increasing in size/premium feel with tenure; all engraved with years and name.

settings.question: Can every award carry our logo?
settings.answer: Yes — your logo on every piece, in a consistent design.

settings.question: Do you provide GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — GST invoices and PO handling for HR.

settings.question: Can you run it annually?
settings.answer: Yes — we keep your design on file to replenish each year. See our recognition program.

settings.heading: Planning long service awards?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
